title: planchonella endlicheri
intro: Planchonella endlicheri, also known as the Red Bead Tree or Red Cedar, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains tannins and other compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Planchonella endlicheri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the bark of the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, or used in a salve or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
